title: Tray — MCP Server
description: Delivers i18n-bakery capabilities directly to AI agents via the Model Context Protocol. Let Claude, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible agent manage your translations automatically.

overview.body: Instead of running CLI commands manually, an AI agent connected via MCP can detect missing translations, extract new keys from source code, write translated strings, and compile production bundles — all in one automated workflow. Tray is the silver platter that makes all of that possible.

check_pantry.title: check_pantry
check_pantry.desc: Scans all locale directories and returns a status report: keys present, missing, and completion percentage per locale vs. the reference locale. This is the AI's first call in any translation workflow.

fry_batter.title: fry_batter
fry_batter.desc: Scans TypeScript/JavaScript source files for t() calls and writes the extracted keys to locale files. New keys get placeholder values; existing keys are never overwritten.

update_recipe.title: update_recipe
update_recipe.desc: Writes or updates a single translation key in a locale file. This is the atomic write primitive — the AI calls this one time per key to persist each translated string.

bake_bundle.title: bake_bundle
bake_bundle.desc: Compiles locale source files into optimized production bundles. Supports minification, content hash filenames (cache busting), per-namespace splitting for lazy loading, and AES-256-GCM encryption.

traversal.title: Path Traversal Prevention
traversal.desc: All user-provided locale, namespace, and key segments are validated to prevent directory traversal attacks (e.g., ../etc/passwd).

prototype.title: Prototype Pollution Guard
prototype.desc: Every object merge operation checks for __proto__, constructor, and prototype keys to prevent prototype pollution attacks.

encryption.title: Encryption Key Enforcement
encryption.desc: The bake_bundle tool validates that an encryptionKey is provided at the tool level before delegating to the BakingManager, preventing silent no-ops.

validation.title: Dot-Notation Key Validation
validation.desc: Translation keys are validated to reject forbidden characters (/ \ ..) and prototype pollution vectors before any file write occurs.

cta.title: Ready to connect your AI agent?
cta.subtitle: Run the MCP server and connect Claude Desktop or any MCP-compatible client.
